message:
You know that one friend who always panics at the slightest hint of danger? Yeah, that’s me. Just last week, I was in the kitchen whipping up a little dinner when I accidentally set off the smoke alarm. I swear, I thought the house was about to explode! My heart raced as I grabbed a towel to fan the alarm, while my friend, who was visiting, jumped up like she was training for the Olympics—sprinting for the door. 

After we both caught our breath, I realized how important it is to have a simple escape plan and know how to handle kitchen mishaps without turning into a scene from a disaster movie. It’s a good reminder that a little preparedness can help calm even the most panicky of us. 

Does anyone else have a friend who makes everything feel like a high-stakes drama? What’s your best kitchen safety tip?
